zh.lifeSummary: 當ROBERT COLVILLE , 9TH LORD OXNAM於1382年出生在英國蘇格蘭洛包爾奧可南時，他的父親THOMAS DE COLVILLE , 8TH LORD OXNAM34歲，母親Margaret de Lindsay30歲。他於大約1417年與Margaret Colville在英國蘇格蘭洛包爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1450年在他的家鄉享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当ROBERT COLVILLE , 9TH LORD OXNAM于1382年出生在英国苏格兰洛包爾奧可南时，他的父亲THOMAS DE COLVILLE , 8TH LORD OXNAM34岁，母亲Margaret de Lindsay30岁。他于大约1417年与Margaret Colville在英国苏格兰洛包爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1450年在他的家乡享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: COLVILLE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Colleville in Seine-Maritime, France, named with the Scandinavian personal name Koli (see Cole 2) + Old French ville ‘settlement, village’. The Scottish branch of the family were descended from Philip de Colville, who came to Scotland as a household knight of kings Malcolm IV (1153–65) and William ‘the Lion’ (1165–1214).

variants.name: Cole
meanings: English: usually from the Middle English and Old French personal name Col(e), Coll(e), Coul(e), a pet form of Nicol (see Nichol and Nicholas ), a common personal name from the mid 13th century onward. English families with this name migrated to Scotland and to Ulster (especially Fermanagh).

English: occasionally perhaps from a different (early) Middle English personal name Col, of native English or Scandinavian origin. Old English Cola was originally a nickname from Old English col ‘coal’ in the sense ‘coal-black (of hair), swarthy’ and is the probable source of most of the examples in Domesday Book. In the northern and eastern counties of England settled by Vikings in the 10th and 11th centuries, alternative sources are Old Norse Kolr and Koli (either from a nickname ‘the swarthy one’ or a short form of names in Kol-), and Old Norse Kollr (from a nickname, perhaps ‘the bald one’).
English: nickname for someone with swarthy skin or black hair, from Middle English col, coul(e) ‘charcoal, coal’ (Old English col).

variants.name: Colvin
meanings: Scottish and Irish (Donegal, Antrim): variant of   Colville  , probably reflecting a local pronunciation. The name was taken to Ulster in the 17th century.
Manx: if not identical with 1, perhaps from the Old Norse personal name Kolbeinn, with /v/ substituted for /b/.

English: from the rare Middle English personal name Colwin, Colvin, which may be a borrowing into English of a Welsh name whose modern form is Collwyn ‘white’, or of colwyn ‘doe, puppy, pet dog’, or of the placename Colwyn (Denbighshire, Radnorshire).

nameMeanings.name: ROBERT
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When ROBERT COLVILLE , 9TH LORD OXNAM was born in 1382, in Oxnam, Roxburghshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, THOMAS DE COLVILLE , 8TH LORD OXNAM, was 34 and his mother, Margaret de Lindsay, was 30. He married Margaret Colville about 1417, in Roxburghshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1450, in his hometown, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque ROBERT COLVILLE , 9TH LORD OXNAM est né en 1382, à Oxnam, Roxburghshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, THOMAS DE COLVILLE , 8TH LORD OXNAM, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Lindsay, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Colville environ 1417, à Roxburghshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1450, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als ROBERT COLVILLE , 9TH LORD OXNAM 1382 in Oxnam, Roxburghshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater THOMAS DE COLVILLE , 8TH LORD OXNAM 34 und seine Mutter Margaret de Lindsay 30. Er hat um 1417 in Roxburghshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Margaret Colville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1450 im Alter von 68 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando ROBERT COLVILLE , 9TH LORD OXNAM è nato il nel 1382 nel Oxnam, Roxburghshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, THOMAS DE COLVILLE , 8TH LORD OXNAM, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Lindsay, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Colville circa 1417, nel Roxburghshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1450, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: ROBERT COLVILLE , 9TH LORD OXNAMが1382年にイギリススコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアオクスナムで生まれた時，父THOMAS DE COLVILLE , 8TH LORD OXNAMは34歳，母Margaret de Lindsayは30歳であった。約1417年にイギリススコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアでMargaret Colvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1450年に故郷で68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: ROBERT COLVILLE , 9TH LORD OXNAM(이)가 1382년 영국 스코틀랜드 록스버그h실르 스남에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 THOMAS DE COLVILLE , 8TH LORD OXNAM(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Lindsay(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1417년 영국 스코틀랜드 록스버그h실르에서 Margaret Colville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1450년 그의 고향에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando ROBERT COLVILLE , 9TH LORD OXNAM nasceu em 1382, em Oxnam, Roxburghshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, THOMAS DE COLVILLE , 8TH LORD OXNAM, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Lindsay, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Colville aproximadamente 1417, em Roxburghshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1450, em sua cidade natal, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда ROBERT COLVILLE , 9TH LORD OXNAM родился в 1382 г. в местности окснам, роксбургшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени THOMAS DE COLVILLE , 8TH LORD OXNAM было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Lindsay, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Colville около 1417 г. в местности роксбургшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1450 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando ROBERT COLVILLE , 9TH LORD OXNAM nació en 1382, en Oxnam, Roxburghshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, THOMAS DE COLVILLE , 8TH LORD OXNAM, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Margaret de Lindsay, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Margaret Colville aproximadamente 1417, en Roxburghshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1450, en su pueblo, a la edad de 68 años.
